name: business-idea-evaluator
safety_limits: do not assign exact success probabilities
do not run external simulations or providers
do not present opinion as market evidence
forbidden_actions: use Docker, APIs or provider keys automatically
modify derived projects as part of idea evaluation
human_approval_triggers: the user asks for guaranteed prediction or exact success probability
the task requests external data collection, scraping or provider-backed simulation
the task turns into investment, legal or compliance advice
rollback_manual: no rollback needed because the skill is read-only
if notes are exported elsewhere, review them manually before using them as a decision basis
validations: output includes risks and validation experiments
profitability confidence stays conservative when data is weak
